description: The largest source file in the codebase (src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr, 797 lines) violates single responsibility by containing 5+ distinct concerns: semaphore management, state tracking, concurrent feed fetching, supervisor/health monitoring, and backward-compat API shims. This epic tracks extracting these concerns into focused modules, reducing duplication, and improving readability.
title: Refactor refresh_loop.cr for readability and reliability
